nasb.text: As the day began to dawn, the woman came and fell down at the doorway of the man’s house where her master was, until full daylight.

esv.text: And as morning appeared, the woman came and fell down at the door of the man’s house where her master was, until it was light.

cnv.text: 天快亮的時候，那女子回到留她主人住宿的那人的房子門口，就仆倒在那裡，直到天亮。

ccb.text: 她回到丈夫住宿的房子门前，就扑倒在地。
